---
title: "Math Society"
---

![Math Society Logo](logo.png){width=150px}

Welcome to the Math Society website! This is your hub for all things mathematics at UBC.

## Quick Links

- 📅 [Upcoming Events](events.qmd)
- 📚 [Learning Resources](resources.qmd)
- ℹ️ [About Us](about.qmd)

## Latest News

Stay tuned for announcements about upcoming seminars, workshops, and social events!

## Get Involved

Join us for:
- Weekly problem-solving sessions
- Guest lectures from faculty
- Math competitions
- Social events
